sources.title: Modern Confucianism
sources.citation_zh: David Elstein，《现代儒学》，《斯坦福哲学百科全书》，2023年首刊；本批使用第1、3、4节的带行段定位网络版。
sources.citation_en: David Elstein, ‘Modern Confucianism,’ Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy, first published 2023; cited by section and web paragraph.

sources.title: Chinese Philosophy, Modern
sources.citation_zh: 《现代中国哲学》，Internet Encyclopedia of Philosophy；本批使用反传统思潮、1923年科玄论战等节。
sources.citation_en: ‘Chinese Philosophy, Modern,’ Internet Encyclopedia of Philosophy; sections on anti-traditional thought and the 1923 science-metaphysics debate.

sources.title: Feng Youlan (Fung Yu-lan)
sources.citation_zh: 《冯友兰》，Internet Encyclopedia of Philosophy，第2节“哲学著作”。
sources.citation_en: ‘Feng Youlan (Fung Yu-lan),’ Internet Encyclopedia of Philosophy, section 2, Philosophical Works.

sources.title: Zhang Junmai (Carsun Chang)
sources.citation_zh: 《张君劢（Carsun Chang）》，Internet Encyclopedia of Philosophy，第2—4节。
sources.citation_en: ‘Zhang Junmai (Carsun Chang),’ Internet Encyclopedia of Philosophy, sections 2–4.

sources.title: 毛泽东《矛盾论》（1937）
sources.citation_zh: 马克思主义文库所收毛泽东《矛盾论》电子文本；正式版本页码仍须对照《毛泽东选集》。
sources.citation_en: Electronic transcription of Mao Zedong's On Contradiction at Marxists Internet Archive; collected-edition pagination remains to be collated.

sources.title: From General Epistemology to the Doctrine of Wisdom: The Essential Spirit of Feng Qi's Philosophy
sources.citation_zh: 陈小龙：《从广义认识论到智慧说——兼论冯契哲学的基本精神》，《华东师范大学学报（哲学社会科学版）》37卷2期，2005，第9—14页，DOI:10.16382/j.cnki.1000-5579.2005.02.003。
sources.citation_en: Chen Xiaolong, ‘From General Epistemology to the Doctrine of Wisdom,’ Journal of East China Normal University (Philosophy and Social Sciences) 37.2 (2005): 9–14.

sources.title: On Ai Siqi's Popular Philosophy
sources.citation_zh: 《论艾思奇〈大众哲学〉》，ICSSHE 2017会议论文；使用出版社摘要，正式研究仍应回到《大众哲学》版本。
sources.citation_en: ‘On Ai Siqi's Popular Philosophy,’ ICSSHE 2017 proceedings; publisher abstract used pending collation with an edition of Popular Philosophy.

sources.title: Li Zehou’s Aesthetics and the Confucian ‘Body’ of Chinese Cultural Sedimentation
sources.citation_zh: Tsuyoshi Ishii：〈李泽厚美学与中国文化积淀的儒家“身体”〉，载Roger T. Ames、贾晋华编《李泽厚与儒家哲学》，夏威夷大学出版社，2018，第313—334页。
sources.citation_en: Tsuyoshi Ishii, ‘Li Zehou’s Aesthetics and the Confucian “Body” of Chinese Cultural Sedimentation,’ in Li Zehou and Confucian Philosophy, University of Hawai‘i Press, 2018, 313–334.

sources.title: On the Problem of Alienation
sources.citation_zh: 王若水：〈论异化问题〉英译，China Report 20卷3期，1984；期刊页面说明该文属于其异化与人道主义论争。
sources.citation_en: Wang Ruoshui, ‘On the Problem of Alienation,’ China Report 20.3 (1984), translated primary article.

sources.title: Zhang Dainian: Creative Synthesis and Chinese Philosophy
sources.citation_zh: 〈张岱年：创造综合与中国哲学〉，载成中英、Nicholas Bunnin编《当代中国哲学》，Blackwell/Wiley，2002。
sources.citation_en: ‘Zhang Dainian: Creative Synthesis and Chinese Philosophy,’ in Contemporary Chinese Philosophy, ed. Chung-ying Cheng and Nicholas Bunnin, Blackwell/Wiley, 2002.

claims.text_zh: 言论自由是公民社会形成的基础条件，也是民主与自由主义得以发展的制度前提。
claims.text_en: Freedom of speech is a foundation of civil society and an institutional precondition for the development of democracy and liberalism.
claims.explanation_zh: 该命题记录严复系统译介西方政治思想时所主张的公共表达条件，不把其全部思想简化为单一自由主义立场。
claims.explanation_en: This records Yan's advocacy of public expression while systematically translating Western political thought, without reducing his whole project to a single liberal position.
claims.locator: section 4.a ‘Yan Fu and Western Learning’, paragraph 2
claims.excerpt_text: freedom of speech as the foundation of a civil society
claims.attribution_note: scholarly encyclopedia synthesis; primary-text collation remains desirable

claims.text_zh: 民生原则把衣食住行置于政治的优先位置，并要求政府对关键公共事业和基本生活保障承担责任。
claims.text_en: The livelihood principle gives political priority to food, clothing, housing, and transportation and assigns government responsibility for essential services and basic welfare.
claims.explanation_zh: 该概括突出三民主义中的社会经济维度，不把民生主义简单等同于自由放任或国家全面垄断。
claims.explanation_en: The claim foregrounds the socioeconomic dimension of the Three Principles without equating livelihood either with laissez-faire or total state monopoly.
claims.locator: section 3.b, paragraph ending with the third Principle
claims.excerpt_text: takes people’s livelihood in food, clothing, housing, and transportation to be of primary importance
claims.attribution_note: secondary synthesis of the livelihood principle

claims.text_zh: 人文学术也应大胆提出假说，再以材料和考证谨慎检验，不能用经典权威替代可复核的研究程序。
claims.text_en: Humanistic inquiry should frame hypotheses boldly and test them carefully against evidence rather than substituting canonical authority for reproducible investigation.
claims.explanation_zh: 胡适把实验主义方法扩展到思想史、文学史与古籍辨伪；这里记录方法论主张而非认可其所有具体结论。
claims.explanation_en: Hu extended experimentalist method to intellectual and literary history and textual criticism; this records the method, not endorsement of every conclusion.
claims.excerpt_text: make hypotheses boldly, but verify them carefully

claims.text_zh: 自然界可以依因果法则研究，但人的精神活动包含自由意志，不能无余地还原为同一种机械因果说明。
claims.text_en: Nature can be studied through causal laws, but human spiritual activity includes free will and cannot be exhaustively reduced to the same mechanical explanation.
claims.explanation_zh: 张君劢以心物二分限制科学解释的范围；这是一种实在论唯心主义方案，而非否定自然科学。
claims.explanation_en: Zhang limits scientific explanation through a mind-matter dualism; this is a realist-idealist program, not a wholesale rejection of natural science.
claims.excerpt_text: the spiritual world of humanity is conducted by free will
claims.attribution_note: scholarly reconstruction with references to Zhang's writings

claims.text_zh: 哲学以逻辑分析把握普遍之理；具体事物则是普遍原则在有形世界中的不完全实现。
claims.text_en: Philosophy grasps universal principle through logical analysis, while concrete things are imperfect realizations of universal principles in the formed world.
claims.explanation_zh: 该命题补充新理学的研究方法，连接其理气结构与现代逻辑分析，而不把“理”当成时间上先出现的实体。
claims.explanation_en: This adds the method of New Rationalism, linking its li-qi structure with logical analysis without treating li as temporally prior entities.
claims.excerpt_text: philosophy is concerned with knowing the universal through logical analysis

claims.text_zh: 根本真实不能被当作外在对象来概念化，只能在本心内部通过自证式体认而把握。
claims.text_en: Fundamental reality cannot be conceptualized as an external object; it is grasped only through inward, self-realizing awareness of the true mind.
claims.explanation_zh: 该命题从知识方法上补充熊十力的智慧之分，并标示其反对象化立场。
claims.explanation_en: This supplements Xiong's distinction between wisdom and discernment by identifying his anti-objectifying method.
claims.excerpt_text: It can be known only through internal self-realization.
claims.attribution_note: SEP translation of and commentary on Xiong's New Treatise

claims.text_zh: 道德心不是外在科学观察推导出的对象，而是在恻隐、羞恶、辞让和是非等反应中直接体验到的身体性体认。
claims.text_en: Moral mind is not inferred from external scientific observation but directly experienced as embodied recognition in compassion, shame, deference, and moral judgment.
claims.explanation_zh: 徐复观保留价值实在论，却拒绝把这种体验建立在超越的双层自我形上学上。
claims.explanation_en: Xu retains realism about value while refusing to ground the experience in a metaphysics of a two-tier transcendent self.
claims.excerpt_text: Xu Fuguan called this direct awareness embodied recognition

claims.text_zh: 心通过“感通”直接与他者和世界发生联系；认识主体与对象不是彼此封闭的实体，而在互动中相互显现。
claims.text_en: Through affective connection, mind directly encounters others and the world; subject and object are not sealed entities but disclose themselves in interaction.
claims.explanation_zh: 这里的“感”不只指情绪，而是相互作用和无阻隔的联系；该概念贯穿唐君毅的认识论与道德哲学。
claims.explanation_en: Here affect does not merely mean emotion but interaction and unobstructed connection; the concept links Tang's epistemology and ethics.
claims.excerpt_text: mind and world are essentially connected and interdependent
claims.attribution_note: scholarly synthesis citing Tang's collected works

claims.text_zh: 某些道德情感不是经验欲望造成的他律冲动，而是真我自我显现的理性或本体论情感。
claims.text_en: Some moral feelings are not heteronomous impulses caused by empirical desire but rational or ontological feelings through which the true self manifests itself.
claims.explanation_zh: 牟宗三借此改造康德的理性与倾向之分，但如何可靠地区分道德情感与经验欲望仍是其理论难题。
claims.explanation_en: Mou thereby revises Kant's reason-inclination distinction, though reliably distinguishing moral feeling from empirical desire remains a problem.
claims.attribution_note: scholarly analysis including an explicit critical limitation

claims.text_zh: 分析具体过程必须区分主要矛盾与非主要矛盾、矛盾的主要方面与非主要方面，否则普遍法则会退化为空洞抽象。
claims.text_en: Analysis of a concrete process must distinguish principal from secondary contradictions and principal from secondary aspects, or universal law degenerates into empty abstraction.
claims.explanation_zh: 《矛盾论》把矛盾特殊性的分析作为从一般辩证法走向具体判断与行动的方法环节。
claims.explanation_en: On Contradiction makes analysis of particularity the methodological link between general dialectics and concrete judgment and action.
claims.locator: 《矛盾论》第四节‘主要的矛盾和主要的矛盾方面’末段
claims.excerpt_text: 不能具体地懂得矛盾的情况，因而也就不能找出解决矛盾的正确的方法。
claims.attribution_note: primary digital text; collected-edition pagination pending

claims.text_zh: 认识论不应止于事实知识，还要说明知识如何转化为关于人生、价值和自由人格的智慧。
claims.text_en: Epistemology should not stop at factual knowledge but explain how knowledge becomes wisdom concerning life, value, and free personality.
claims.explanation_zh: 冯契以广义认识论组织“知识—智慧”问题，试图贯通科学认识、价值选择与人格培养。
claims.explanation_en: Feng Qi organizes the knowledge-wisdom problem through a broad epistemology linking science, value choice, and formation of personality.
claims.excerpt_text: The main thread of Feng Qi's philosophy is his doctrine of wisdom.
claims.work_title: From General Epistemology to the Doctrine of Wisdom
claims.attribution_note: peer-reviewed secondary abstract; full-text page collation recommended

claims.text_zh: 马克思主义哲学的唯物论、认识论和辩证法应以日常事例和通俗语言向非专业读者解释。
claims.text_en: Marxist materialism, epistemology, and dialectics should be explained to non-specialists through ordinary examples and accessible language.
claims.explanation_zh: 《大众哲学》的哲学贡献也包含传播形式：它把专业概念转化为面向大众的日常论证。
claims.explanation_en: Popular Philosophy's contribution includes its form of communication: translating technical concepts into everyday arguments for a broad readership.

claims.text_zh: 审美心理不是脱离历史的先验结构，而是社会实践、礼乐传统与情感形式长期积淀到身体和心理中的结果。
claims.text_en: Aesthetic psychology is not an ahistorical a priori structure but the sedimented result of social practice, ritual-musical traditions, and affective forms in body and mind.
claims.explanation_zh: 积淀说把马克思式实践、康德美学问题与中国礼乐经验连接起来；该命题不把“积淀”误解为静态遗传。
claims.explanation_en: Sedimentation links Marxian practice, Kantian aesthetic questions, and Chinese ritual-musical experience; it should not be mistaken for static inheritance.
claims.locator: chapter 13, pp. 313–334, title and chapter framing
claims.work_title: Li Zehou’s Aesthetics and the Confucian ‘Body’
claims.attribution_note: university-press secondary interpretation; claim cross-checked against Li's established sedimentation framework

claims.text_zh: 异化并非只属于资本主义；社会主义社会也必须检视制度和权力是否使人的活动及其成果反过来支配人。
claims.text_en: Alienation is not confined to capitalism; socialist society must also examine whether institutions and power make human activity and its products dominate people.
claims.explanation_zh: 王若水以马克思早期异化理论和人道主义批评社会主义内部问题；这在1980年代形成重要哲学论争。
claims.explanation_en: Wang used Marx's early theory of alienation and humanism to criticize problems within socialism, generating a major 1980s philosophical controversy.
claims.locator: journal landing-page abstract and editorial introduction
claims.attribution_note: translated primary article; exact Chinese-edition pagination remains pending

claims.text_zh: 中国现代哲学不能在复古与全盘西化之间二选一，而应以分析和批判形成兼收中国传统、马克思主义与西方哲学成果的创造综合。
claims.text_en: Modern Chinese philosophy need not choose between restoration and wholesale Westernization; critical analysis can create a synthesis of Chinese, Marxist, and Western resources.
claims.explanation_zh: “综合创新”不是把不同传统机械拼接，而是经由相容性辨析、批判和重构产生新体系。
claims.explanation_en: Creative synthesis is not mechanical juxtaposition but a new system produced through compatibility analysis, critique, and reconstruction.
claims.work_title: Zhang Dainian: Creative Synthesis and Chinese Philosophy
claims.attribution_note: academic book chapter; full-text locator should be refined in the next source pass

relations.note_zh: 牟宗三承认熊十力为师，并把熊氏的内在非概念认识改造为对真我、自由意志与道德情感的论证。
relations.note_en: Mou acknowledged Xiong as his teacher and reworked Xiong's inward non-conceptual knowing into an account of true self, free will, and moral feeling.
relations.excerpt_text: Mou does call Xiong his teacher

relations.note_zh: 徐复观沿用熊十力所使用的“体认”来说明直接道德意识，但拒绝熊、牟、唐的超越自我形上学。
relations.note_en: Xu adopted Xiong's term embodied recognition for direct moral awareness while rejecting the transcendent-self metaphysics of Xiong, Mou, and Tang.
relations.excerpt_text: a term employed by Xiong

relations.note_zh: 唐君毅不是熊十力思想的简单继承者，但其非对象化道德认识与感通论延续了熊氏开启的问题方向。
relations.note_en: Tang was not a straightforward disciple, yet his non-objectifying moral cognition and affective connection continue a problem-space opened by Xiong.
relations.excerpt_text: picked up by each of his followers

relations.note_zh: 两者都肯定直接道德反应；牟宗三把它归于超越真我，徐复观则以“形而中学”拒绝双层自我形上学。
relations.note_en: Both affirm direct moral response, but Mou locates it in a transcendent true self while Xu's embodied learning rejects a two-tier metaphysics.
relations.excerpt_text: rejected the metaphysical orientation of Xiong, Mou, and Tang

relations.note_zh: 两者都区分外在经验知识与直接道德认识，并认为科学知识不能自行生成道德反应。
relations.note_en: Both distinguish external empirical knowledge from direct moral knowing and deny that scientific information alone generates moral response.
relations.excerpt_text: empirical knowledge is useful, but it must be controlled by moral knowledge

relations.note_zh: 1923年科玄论战中，胡适属于丁文江的科学派阵营，反对张君劢以直觉和自由意志限制科学方法。
relations.note_en: In the 1923 debate, Hu joined Ding Wenjiang's scientific camp against Zhang's use of intuition and free will to limit scientific method.
relations.excerpt_text: Hu Shi ... were in Ding’s camp

relations.note_zh: 梁启超是张君劢的导师，并在科玄论战中支持科学知识并非万能，但同时批评张氏夸大直觉与自由意志。
relations.note_en: Liang was Zhang's mentor and supported limits on scientific omnipotence while criticizing Zhang for overstating intuition and free will.
relations.excerpt_text: Chang’s mentor, Liang Qichao, soon came to his aid

relations.note_zh: 科玄论战中梁漱溟站在张君劢一边，二者都拒绝以单一科学方法穷尽人生与文化问题。
relations.note_en: Liang Shuming sided with Zhang in the debate; both denied that one scientific method exhausts questions of life and culture.
relations.excerpt_text: Liang Shuming ... sided with Chang

relations.note_zh: 张东荪在科玄论战中与张君劢同一阵营；其文化认识论也反对把单一自然科学方法当作全部知识的尺度。
relations.note_en: Zhang Dongsun sided with Zhang Junmai; his cultural epistemology likewise resists treating one natural-scientific method as the measure of all knowledge.
relations.excerpt_text: Zhang Dungsun ... sided with Chang

relations.note_zh: 严复系统译介科学、自由与政治理论，为胡适一代的科学主义和自由主义议程提供了早期语汇，但二人的方法与传统态度并不相同。
relations.note_en: Yan's translations supplied early vocabularies of science and liberty later used by Hu's generation, though their methods and attitudes to tradition differed.
relations.locator: sections 4.a–4.c, especially transition after Yan Fu
relations.excerpt_text: many of his followers turned their back on traditional culture

relations.note_zh: 两条观点都把辩证法从抽象教条转向可处理具体经验的方法；本关系仅标概念互补，不声称单向影响。
relations.note_en: Both turn dialectics from abstract dogma toward a method usable in concrete experience; this marks conceptual complementarity, not a claim of one-way influence.
relations.excerpt_text: 以扫除教条主义思想为主要的目标

relations.note_zh: 李泽厚的积淀说把实践塑造主体的命题扩展到审美心理、身体与文化历史；这里不主张其理论可还原为毛泽东哲学。
relations.note_en: Li's sedimentation extends practice-shaped subjectivity into aesthetics, embodiment, and cultural history without reducing his theory to Mao's philosophy.
relations.excerpt_text: Chinese Cultural Sedimentation

relations.note_zh: 熊十力从本心内部自证根本真实，李泽厚则以历史实践和文化积淀说明心理结构，构成两种不同的主体发生论。
relations.note_en: Xiong realizes fundamental reality inwardly, whereas Li explains psychic structures through historical practice and sedimentation: two different genealogies of subjectivity.
relations.excerpt_text: fundamental reality ... has to be sought within one’s own mind

relations.note_zh: 冯友兰以逻辑分析重构理学，张岱年以综合创新重构多种资源；两者都是传统概念现代系统化的不同方案。
relations.note_en: Feng reconstructs principle-learning through logical analysis, while Zhang uses creative synthesis; both modernize tradition through different forms of system-building.
relations.excerpt_text: Creative Synthesis and Chinese Philosophy

relations.note_zh: 冯契以广义认识论贯通知识与智慧，张岱年以综合创新贯通多种思想资源，均拒绝学科和传统之间的僵硬割裂。
relations.note_en: Feng's broad epistemology connects knowledge and wisdom, while Zhang's creative synthesis connects traditions; both resist rigid compartmentalization.
relations.excerpt_text: construction of such an epistemological system

relations.note_zh: 张君劢以自由意志和精神不可预测性拒绝马克思主义历史说明，毛泽东则以矛盾的具体分析发展马克思主义方法；关系是立场对照，不是直接论战。
relations.note_en: Zhang invoked free will and the unpredictability of spirit against Marxist history, whereas Mao developed concrete contradiction analysis; this is a contrast, not a direct debate.
relations.excerpt_text: science cannot predict the future of humanity, which is why he rejected Marxism

relations.note_zh: 王若水从马克思主义内部以异化和人道主义反思社会主义实践，与毛泽东时期形成的正统哲学框架保持批判张力；不把它写成二人直接交锋。
relations.note_en: From within Marxism, Wang used alienation and humanism to criticize socialist practice, creating tension with Mao-era orthodoxy without implying a direct exchange.
relations.excerpt_text: articles on Alienation and Humanism

relations.note_zh: 言论自由说明公民形成公共判断的条件，民权主义说明政治主权的归属；两者在制度层面互补。
relations.note_en: Free speech concerns citizens' conditions for public judgment, while popular sovereignty concerns where political authority resides; the positions are institutionally complementary.
relations.excerpt_text: foundation for democracy and liberalism to flourish in China

relations.note_zh: 孙中山把民众主权置于政治正当性的中心，蒋庆则主张天、地、人三重正当性，反对把民主授权作为唯一来源。
relations.note_en: Sun centers legitimacy on popular sovereignty, whereas Jiang posits legitimacy of heaven, earth, and humanity rather than democratic authorization alone.
relations.excerpt_text: The Principle of People’s Sovereignty accepts the Western idea of democracy

relations.note_zh: 龚自珍强调制度必变与人才判断，魏源把这种危机意识推进为系统调查海外并学习长技的实践方案；这是思想脉络比较，不主张直接影响。
relations.note_en: Gong stresses institutional change and informed judgment; Wei turns crisis-awareness toward systematic overseas inquiry and strategic learning. This is a conceptual lineage, not direct influence.
relations.locator: 《海国图志·原叙》首段，说明著书三旨处
relations.excerpt_text: 为师夷长技以制夷而作。

relations.note_zh: 龚自珍从历史变迁说明旧法并非不可改，章太炎进一步把革命视为生成公理、清除旧俗的行动机制。
relations.note_en: Gong argues from historical change that old institutions are mutable; Zhang radicalizes change by making revolution a mechanism for articulating public reason and removing custom.
relations.locator: 《驳康有为论革命书》中段，回应‘公理未明、旧俗俱在’
relations.excerpt_text: 公理之未明，即以革命明之；旧俗之俱在，即以革命去之。

relations.note_zh: 魏源代表技术学习与政治自主问题的近代开端，杜维明则要求现代技术文明把人重新理解为宇宙生态秩序中的参与者，形成跨时期的现代化问题桥接。
relations.note_en: Wei opens the modern problem of technical learning and political agency; Tu reframes technological modernity by embedding humanity in a cosmic-ecological order.
relations.excerpt_text: the human is embedded in the cosmic order

relations.note_zh: 谭嗣同以‘通’和‘平等’反对人我、上下阻隔，何殷震则具体揭示父权、资本与帝国造成的性别支配，后者可作为前者平等问题的结构化扩展。
relations.note_en: Tan opposes barriers through communication and equality; He-Yin specifies intersecting patriarchal, capitalist, and imperial structures, extending equality into structural critique.
relations.locator: publisher description, paragraphs 1–3; table of six translated essays
relations.excerpt_text: patriarchy, imperialism, capitalism, and gender subjugation

relations.note_zh: 谭嗣同以仁之‘通’打破人我界限，黄勇以与他人一体说明儒家德性；二者共享反孤立自我的关系性方向。
relations.note_en: Tan's communicative ren breaks self-other barriers, while Huang interprets virtue as forming one body with others; both reject an isolated self.
relations.locator: Frontiers of Philosophy in China 13.2 (2018), abstract and pp. 226–230
relations.excerpt_text: the Confucian ideal of a virtuous person is to be in one body with others

relations.note_zh: 章太炎此文就是对康有为反革命论证的直接驳斥；它反对以公理未明、旧俗未去为推迟革命的理由。
relations.note_en: Zhang's essay directly refutes Kang's case against revolution, rejecting unclear public principle and surviving custom as reasons to postpone revolutionary action.
relations.locator: 《驳康有为论革命书》篇题及中段针对康氏‘公理未明、旧俗俱在’的答复
relations.excerpt_text: 公理之未明，即以革命明之。

relations.note_zh: 何殷震揭示性别支配与资本、帝国的交织，汪晖则批判权力关系被市场和治理话语自然化；二者都把看似自然的秩序重新政治化。
relations.note_en: He-Yin exposes gender domination as interlocked with capital and empire; Wang criticizes the naturalization of power by market and governance discourse. Both repoliticize apparently natural orders.
relations.locator: New Left Review II/41 (2006), pp. 39–45, ‘State and ideology’
relations.excerpt_text: De-naturalization must be used to combat depoliticization.

relations.note_zh: 蔡元培与胡适同属新文化运动的重要教育和学术领导者；人格教育与可检验研究方法构成其教育改革的互补面向。
relations.note_en: Cai and Hu were prominent educational and scholarly leaders of the New Culture Movement; personality education and verifiable inquiry are complementary reform dimensions.
relations.excerpt_text: student leaders ... Hu Shi ... Cai Yuanpei

relations.note_zh: 蔡元培以完整人格统摄知识与技能，马一浮以六艺义理整体组织经典教育；两者都反对把教育缩减为碎片化知识灌输。
relations.note_en: Cai integrates knowledge and skill under whole-person formation; Ma organizes classical learning through the Six Arts as a hermeneutic whole. Both resist fragmented instruction.
relations.locator: article abstract, sentences 3–4 on the interconnected system and hermeneutic circle
relations.excerpt_text: 一个内在相互关联的义理系统和意义整体

relations.note_zh: 李达把辩证法、逻辑和认识论统一为实践哲学，毛泽东以主要矛盾和矛盾特殊性说明这种方法如何进入具体判断。
relations.note_en: Li Da unifies dialectics, logic, and epistemology as practical philosophy; Mao shows how this method enters concrete judgment through principal and particular contradictions.
relations.excerpt_text: dialectics, logic and the epistemology ... constitute a unified philosophy

relations.note_zh: 李达把逻辑纳入辩证唯物主义的实践认识论，金岳霖则以形式与质料分析道与实在；二者代表民国哲学中不同的系统化路径。
relations.note_en: Li Da embeds logic in dialectical-materialist practical epistemology; Jin analyzes Dao and reality through form and stuff. They exemplify different Republican-era system-building paths.
relations.locator: chapter sections ‘Form and Stuff’ and ‘Reality and Process’
relations.excerpt_text: dao can be analyzed into elements, namely, matter (or stuff) and form

relations.note_zh: 马一浮从六艺整体重建义理诠释，钱穆从文化主体性使用现代史学方法；两者都在不放弃传统主体的前提下回应现代学术。
relations.note_en: Ma reconstructs meaning through the Six Arts as a whole; Qian uses modern historiography from cultural subjectivity. Both engage modern scholarship without abandoning tradition's agency.
relations.excerpt_text: he never opposed the use of either modern or western approaches

relations.note_zh: 金岳霖以形式与质料分析道，冯友兰以理与气说明普遍和特殊；两者都借现代分析重建中国形上学，但概念体系并不相同。
relations.note_en: Jin analyzes Dao through form and stuff; Feng explains universal and particular through li and qi. Both modernize Chinese metaphysics analytically without sharing one system.
relations.excerpt_text: the ontological relationship between the universal and the particular

relations.note_zh: 贺麟以唯心论资源推动儒学新开展，张世英以差异中的相通重释主体和世界；两者构成中国现代唯心论从文化更新到关系存在论的延展。
relations.note_en: He Lin uses idealist resources for Confucian renewal; Zhang Shiying rethinks subject and world through difference-in-connection, extending modern Chinese idealism toward relational ontology.
relations.locator: 《北京大学学报》1995年第4期，第53—59页，网页摘要
relations.excerpt_text: 差异与相通不是相互排斥，而是互为条件

relations.note_zh: 唐君毅曾明确称方东美为老师；方氏的生命宇宙论与唐氏感通论都强调人与世界的内在联系，但唐并非简单照搬其体系。
relations.note_en: Tang explicitly identified Fang as his teacher. Fang's living cosmology and Tang's affective connection both stress intrinsic mind-world relation, without implying simple doctrinal copying.
relations.locator: section 1, paragraph 11; bibliography entry on Fang, Tang, and Huayan
relations.excerpt_text: he said his teacher was Fang Dongmei, not Xiong

relations.note_zh: 徐复观以身体性道德经验解释历史思想，劳思光则要求从理论的基源问题重构思想史；两者分别代表经验体认与问题史方法。
relations.note_en: Xu interprets thought through embodied moral experience; Lao reconstructs intellectual history from fundamental theoretical questions. They represent experiential and problem-historical methods.
relations.locator: PDF pp. 74–76, discussion of the fundamental-question method
relations.excerpt_text: 基源研究法

relations.note_zh: 劳思光从基源问题重构哲学史，张岱年以分析批判形成综合创新；二者都把传统研究理解为主动的理论重建。
relations.note_en: Lao reconstructs history from fundamental questions; Zhang forms creative synthesis through analysis and critique. Both treat tradition-study as active theoretical reconstruction.
relations.excerpt_text: Creative Synthesis and Chinese Philosophy

relations.note_zh: 成中英的本体诠释学连接理解、道德与存在，杨国荣的具体形上学连接本真存在及其显现；两者都反对脱离经验世界的抽象本体论。
relations.note_en: Cheng's onto-hermeneutics links understanding, morality, and being; Yang's concrete metaphysics links authentic being with its manifestations. Both resist world-detached ontology.
relations.locator: Philosophical Horizons, chapters 1 and 7, pp. 1–22 and 183–210
relations.excerpt_text: the original unity of being and the manifestations of being

relations.note_zh: 杜维明以‘人—宇宙’说明人的生态嵌入，王蓉蓉以阴阳说明关系性生成；后者提供前者生态人文主义可使用的过程论语言。
relations.note_en: Tu's anthropocosmic view embeds humanity ecologically; Robin Wang's yinyang explains relational generation, offering process language compatible with ecological humanism.
relations.locator: Yinyang, Introduction pp. 6–12 and chapter 2 pp. 41–82
relations.excerpt_text: a philosophical and cultural paradigm

relations.note_zh: 陈来从文明核心价值重申责任、社群与和谐的优先性，李泽厚则从实践积淀解释传统心理形式；二者代表大陆当代儒学研究的不同重构路径。
relations.note_en: Chen restates civilizational priorities of responsibility, community, and harmony; Li explains inherited forms through practical sedimentation. They are different mainland reconstruction paths.
relations.excerpt_text: some mainland scholars now developing their own modern Confucian philosophies

relations.note_zh: 黄勇以‘与他人一体’超越利己与利他的二分，李晨阳以差异要素的相互调整说明动态和谐；二者都保存差异中的关系整体。
relations.note_en: Huang's one-body account moves beyond egoism/altruism, while Li's dynamic harmony coordinates differing elements; both preserve relational wholes without erasing difference.
relations.locator: Reshaping Confucianism, chapter 1, pp. 27–52; publisher abstract
relations.excerpt_text: different elements join hands to generate new wholes through mutual adjustment

relations.note_zh: 王若水用异化批判社会主义内部支配，汪晖用去自然化批判去政治化权力；二者都把批判指向制度内部被遮蔽的支配关系。
relations.note_en: Wang Ruoshui uses alienation to criticize domination within socialism; Wang Hui uses denaturalization against depoliticized power. Both expose obscured internal domination.
relations.excerpt_text: De-naturalization must be used to combat depoliticization.

relations.note_zh: 赵汀阳把世界整体设为政治单位，白彤东则在国家政体层面组合民主、权利与贤能政治；两者的制度设计尺度和正当性问题不同。
relations.note_en: Zhao takes the world as political unit, whereas Bai designs a state-level hybrid of democracy, rights, and meritocracy; their institutional scales and legitimacy problems differ.
relations.locator: Against Political Equality, book abstract and chapter 3
relations.excerpt_text: meritocratic characteristics combined with democratic elements

relations.note_zh: 白彤东与蒋庆都被归入当代反对把民主政治平等视为唯一标准的儒家贤能政治方向，但前者保留更多民主与准自由主义成分。
relations.note_en: Bai and Jiang are grouped among contemporary Confucian meritocratic alternatives to democracy as the sole standard, though Bai retains more democratic and quasi-liberal elements.
relations.excerpt_text: Confucian meritocracy (Bai 2020; Bell 2015; Jiang 2012)

relations.note_zh: 钱穆以文化主体性吸收现代方法，陈来则把责任、义务、社群与和谐概括为文明价值排序；后者是当代价值论层面的延展。
relations.note_en: Qian combines cultural subjectivity with modern method; Chen articulates responsibility, obligation, community, and harmony as civilizational value priorities, extending the project normatively.
relations.locator: 《中华文明的核心价值》导论；清华大学机构页首段
relations.excerpt_text: 责任先于自由，义务先于权利，社群高于个人，和谐高于冲突。

relations.note_zh: 张世英从差异与相通说明主体间理解，成中英则把诠释活动与本体、道德统一；两者都把理解看作参与存在关系，而非外在复制。
relations.note_en: Zhang explains understanding through difference and connection; Cheng unites interpretation with ontology and morality. Both treat understanding as participation in being-relations rather than external copying.
relations.locator: Journal of Chinese Philosophy 27.1 (2000), pp. 33–38 and 61–68
relations.excerpt_text: Confucian Onto-Hermeneutics: Morality and Ontology

relations.note_zh: 方东美把宇宙理解为生命流行的场域，杜维明把人理解为宇宙秩序中的嵌入者；两者构成生命宇宙论向生态人文主义的跨代桥接。
relations.note_en: Fang treats the universe as a field of living creativity; Tu embeds humanity in cosmic order. Together they bridge life-cosmology and ecological humanism across generations.
relations.excerpt_text: the human is embedded in the cosmic order
